{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212156289FC30C85B6EE8686474F"}"},"total":1779},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598418323202671385","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这绝对是一本好书，完结了才发现我还没有打个评价，回来补一个。回归正题，这绝对算得上一本佳作，无论番茄或者起点，作者的文笔诙谐，该严肃时也不失严肃，总能巧妙的调动起观众的情绪。同时，作为一本万界流，也没有说是一个世界过完了就把那个世界丢了，还是能看到咱们的主角时不时的回到去过的世界……然后我发现我竟然不知道要说啥，优点很多，也很杂，但都已经被我用前面那几句话概括完了，总之就是大家快去看啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769148102,"group_id":"7434435977092811838","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"丝之歌终于出了！哈哈！丝之歌终于出了！（郎中：这人终于疯了.mp3）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N92wXHcYgHTWH5RhBEqfN5k=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c719355bf1e74c2eb0cb074a4a952bc9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618811&x-signature=gcJCOs1udYpN9GwP1%2FudIgHNa5w%3D","user_id":"289894130001053","user_name":"寻神者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"289894130001053","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7434435977092811838","book_info":{"abstract":"早上好，夜之城！我是大家最喜欢的主持人斯坦！
有人说夜之城永远是那样糜烂，灯红酒绿下隐藏的是底层人民的累累尸骨，还有人说赛博朋克的真相就是永恒不断地悲剧，死亡与失去。
但有大佬却不这么认为，他保下了曼恩小队，送大卫和露西上月球的同时，顺便在月球修建了超大生态圈，吊着新轨道航空公司打。
还有杰克，终于出人头地，不光成为夜之城的大人物，还成为夜之城的市长。那只被新美国拴住的百灵鸟也因他摆脱樊笼，回到真正的“自然”中。
而V呢，那就要看你问的是和朱迪一起在海伍德新建的海滨度假区度假的瓦莱丽，还是陪着帕南经营【恶土生态园】的文森特了。
“这一切都源自我们最大的“逆熵”，源于我们最伟大的公司创始人，被誉为“造物主”的江秉先生！
拳打“荒坂”，脚踢“军用科技”，顺便给了“生物科技”几个大耳光，让他们屁滚尿流的统统爬出夜之城。
多亏了“逆熵”，多亏了我们的“造物主”江秉先生，才有了我们如此美好的今天，让我们在感谢江秉先生的欢呼中，一起开启全新的一天吧！
赛博朋克2077世界为主。
关键词：诸天、赛博朋克、颠覆世界、科技、义体医生、公司、中间人、怪猎、巫师3、生化危机、死亡空间、战锤、在加上一点点爱。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c5d6ad70c937e03d2109761509ce93d9","author":"东风与","author_id":"","book_id":"7434435977092811838","book_name":"从工匠开始晋升的造物主","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7434437149287531070","read_count":"35635","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2424834"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"1116","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,诸天万界,同人,赛博朋克,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5f56a369c72552fecbb145be72656319~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285389&x-signature=9OJ9JPiHdURlGW5N1wAVin1XV4M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93361208352","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1268"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212156289FC30C85B6EE8686474F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读57小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":206928,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6494},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7573138122509746968","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"确实好看，作者的文笔相当风趣幽默，总能在一个个黑色幽默的调侃里展示2077主世界的吃人本质。对于其他世界的开拓作者显然有自己独到的考量，我尤为喜欢作者把怪猎一些为了游戏性考量的设定想法子融汇进自己的世界观里，给我一种“他娘的还真能说通”的幽默感。每个副本的描写可以随心品读，毕竟文字量摆在这儿，觉得某个副本描写拖沓了略过就是，总能看过瘾的[饱了]
顺带一提，如果你用ai朗读选择甜美女声开1.3倍速，听到它念“地地道道的老红脖子”的时候，那个语气会让听到的人特别难绷"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763262418,"group_id":"7434435977092811838","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3QE+9OiNQfzlxSeOQbc02eG020vZ5Y4GTeGV0QbriCG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c50d6c16b75047ad8ca4cac14d3c0027~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618841&x-signature=1sfsN%2FoYHZZus2m2WXLbnAyB2Ic%3D","user_id":"2060930957455903","user_name":"咳咳壳壳_"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2060930957455903","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7434435977092811838","book_info":{"abstract":"早上好，夜之城！我是大家最喜欢的主持人斯坦！
有人说夜之城永远是那样糜烂，灯红酒绿下隐藏的是底层人民的累累尸骨，还有人说赛博朋克的真相就是永恒不断地悲剧，死亡与失去。

还有杰克，终于出人头地，不光成为夜之城的大人物，还成为夜之城的市长。那只被新美国拴住的百灵鸟也因他摆脱樊笼，回到真正的“自然”中。
而V呢，那就要看你问的是和朱迪一起在海伍德新建的海滨度假区度假的瓦莱丽，还是陪着帕南经营【恶土生态园】的文森特了。
“这一切都源自我们最大的“逆熵”，源于我们最伟大的公司创始人，被誉为“造物主”的江秉先生！
拳打“荒坂”，脚踢“军用科技”，顺便给了“生物科技”几个大耳光，让他们屁滚尿流的统统爬出夜之城。
多亏了“逆熵”，多亏了我们的“造物主”江秉先生，才有了我们如此美好的今天，让我们在感谢江秉先生的欢呼中，一起开启全新的一天吧！
赛博朋克2077世界为主。
关键词：诸天、赛博朋克、颠覆世界、科技、义体医生、公司、中间人、怪猎、巫师3、生化危机、死亡空间、战锤、在加上一点点爱。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c5d6ad70c937e03d2109761509ce93d9","author":"东风与","author_id":"","book_id":"7434435977092811838","book_name":"从工匠开始晋升的造物主","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7434437149287531070","read_count":"35635","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2424834"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"1116","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,诸天万界,同人,赛博朋克,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5f56a369c72552fecbb145be72656319~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285389&x-signature=9OJ9JPiHdURlGW5N1wAVin1XV4M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93361208352","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2092"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212156289FC30C85B6EE8686474F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读142小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":365066,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":509555,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8517},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7522524975904654142","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好久没有这熬夜看小说了，这是一本不可多得的精品诸天流小说，设定很新颖，剧情也不错，就是换地图转折地有点生硬，并且都是游戏背景，对于我这种没玩过游戏的读者来说，有一点难受，有时候还得自己去搜背景故事，如果有一些背景介绍，对于新读者来说会很友好。
但是瑕不掩瑜，这只是很小的缺点，工匠的设定很有趣，赛博朋克等各类科技魔法混杂，让人眼前一亮。有一点很好的是作者并没有过多的地把笔墨浪费在女人身上，浅尝辄止，专注描写主角以及势力的发展。
还有就是每个世界的设定融和得很好，没有给人混乱的感觉，战力没有崩。
说实话，真本事在起点我真会全订支持一下，比起点大部分小说都写得好。","text_exts":[{"e":151,"s":147,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741013898686474F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227522524975904654142%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227434435977092811838%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751481451,"group_id":"7434435977092811838","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/mIqbHlrRgz5OyfctKZQOEmTYGh4r3WjwZBE/x3N3f+","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2e6d05c9ad1942a987a6042841f40ea2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621695&x-signature=gLyqQcfnatLZjzTwxbbKwRd9W1Y%3D","user_id":"2744839466661856","user_name":"墨染峰辰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2744839466661856","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1737312267,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7434435977092811838","book_info":{"abstract":"早上好，夜之城！我是大家最喜欢的主持人斯坦！
